case_title: GABRIEL CAUICH OJEDA VS. PETER TRIPOUSIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY OJEDA, GABRIEL CAUICH AS TO DEFENDANT TRIPOUSIS, PETER DBA  VIP PAINTERS AKA: VIP CONSTRUCTION AND PAINTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OJEDA, GABRIEL CAUICH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRIPOUSIS, PETER DBA  VIP PAINTERS AKA: VIP CONSTRUCTION AND PAINTING
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT TRIPOUSIS, PETER DBA  VIP PAINTERS AKA: VIP CONSTRUCTION AND PAINTING
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OJEDA, GABRIEL CAUICH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIPOUSIS, PETER DBA  VIP PAINTERS AKA: VIP CONSTRUCTION AND PAINTING $5,900.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, UPDATE OF DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OJEDA, GABRIEL CAUICH
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TRIPOUSIS, PETER DBA  VIP PAINTERS AKA: VIP CONSTRUCTION AND PAINTING HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO PETER TRIPOUSIS
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO PETER TRIPOUSIS, 2415 45TH AVE., SF CA 94116 (RE-ISSUED)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-04-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED FOR THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION AND THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT HE HAD HIS FRIEND SERVE THE DEFENDANT, BUT DID NOT HAVE THE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THROUGH COURT INTERPRETER THAT HE MUST FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS ON THE BACK OF THE FORM AS TO HOW ORDER OF EXAMINATIONS CAN BE SERVED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) SPANISH INTERPRETER REQUESTED FOR NEW DATE FOR PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2011 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO AUG-11-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS TO BRING IN THE COMPLETED SC-133 FORM AND INFORMATION REGARDING MR. WHALEN - PHONE NUMBER AND ADDRESS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-08-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT. ELLEN ROSENTHAL INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH AND SPANISH/ENGLISH FOR PLAINTIFF. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506). DEFENDANT IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF $75.00 EACH MONTH BEGINNING SEPTEMBER 1, 2011 AND $75.00 EACH MONTH THEREAFTER ON THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH. (PLAINTIFF IS TO CALL DEFENDANT TO ARRANGE FOR PAYMENT EACH MONTH.)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-05-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NAD DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARTHA RIESEN PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-05-2012 IS CONTINUED TO APR-16-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF IS TO APPEAR WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRIPOUSIS, PETER DBA  VIP PAINTERS AKA: VIP CONSTRUCTION AND PAINTING

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-16-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-10-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506."IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
